expectations.text: Identifies TrodesPosV1 as the LED-tracking path and DLCPosV1 as the pose-estimation path
expectations.evidence: 'TrodesPosV1 (Trodes / LED-based)' and 'DLCPosV1 (DeepLabCut / pose estimation)' explicitly identified.

expectations.text: Notes that both can coexist as separate part-table entries on the same session
expectations.evidence: 'For the same (nwb_file_name, interval_list_name), you can populate Trodes and DLC and end up with two distinct merge rows on the session — one per source.'

expectations.text: Names at least one tradeoff dimension (latency / accuracy / setup cost / bodypart granularity)
expectations.evidence: Names multiple: setup cost, latency, bodypart granularity, GPU/compute requirement.
